---
title: "Spotted Ape"
subtitle: "Strategic Execution Engine"
author: "thespottedape.com · in collaboration with marcelmare.com"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: black
    css: spotted_ape_theme.css
    slide-number: true
    progress: true
    transition: fade
    transition-speed: fast
    background-transition: fade
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    margin: 0.08
    highlight-style: github
    code-block-bg: true
    embed-resources: true
    auto-animate: true
    controls: true
    controls-layout: bottom-right
    footer: "marcelmare.com"
---

## {.slide-hero background-color="#FAFAF8"}

::: {.hero-eyebrow}
Strategic Execution Engine
:::

::: {.hero-title}
Where Machine *Speed*  
Meets Human *Wisdom*
:::

::: {.hero-rule}
:::

::: {.pill-row}
[Human-in-the-Loop (HITL)]{.pill .pill-amber}
[Team-as-a-Subscription]{.pill .pill-teal}
[Agentic Mesh]{.pill .pill-amber}
:::


## The Problem {.slide-section background-color="#FAFAF8"}

::: {.eyebrow}
The Problem
:::

### Strategy Dies in Execution {.section-title}

Traditional consulting delivers decks. Organisations are left navigating the gap between ambition and operational reality — alone.

::: {.vs-grid}

::: {.vs-col .vs-bad}
**Legacy Consulting**

✕ Static strategy documents  
✕ Organisational inertia ignored  
✕ Human bandwidth limits scale  
✕ Vanity metrics masquerade as outcomes  
:::

::: {.vs-col .vs-good}
**Spotted Ape HITL**

✓ Living, breathing operations  
✓ Designed to overcome inertia  
✓ Agent Mesh executes at 24/7 scale  
✓ Decisions that hold under real-world push  
:::

:::


## Our Framework {.slide-section background-color="#FAFAF8"}

::: {.eyebrow}
Our Framework
:::

### Strategic Steering, Not Consulting {.section-title}

> *"We navigate combinatorial complexity by deploying an Agentic Mesh that executes at machine speed, governed by a Human-in-the-Loop steering force."*

::: {.two-col}

::: {.card-amber}
**Human Layer**

**Problem Reframing**  
Name the challenge correctly before a single agent is deployed. Stress-test the North Star.
:::

::: {.card-teal}
**Agent Layer**

**Agentic Mesh Execution**  
24/7 multi-channel distribution, SEO monitoring, content variation — at machine speed.
:::

:::


## Core Capability {.slide-section background-color="#FAFAF8"}

::: {.eyebrow}
Core Capability
:::

### Managing Combinatorial Complexity {.section-title}

Thousands of variables — micro-segments, cultural nuances, real-time signals — exceed human bandwidth alone.

::: {.mesh-grid}

::: {.mesh-node}
⬡

**Multi-Channel**  
Distributed execution
:::

::: {.mesh-node}
◎

**Micro-Segmentation**  
Behavioural precision
:::

::: {.mesh-node}
⟳

**Real-Time Signals**  
Market adaptation
:::

::: {.mesh-node}
◈

**Pattern Recognition**  
Human curation layer
:::

::: {.mesh-node .node-teal}
⌘

**Cultural Safety**  
Resonance, not noise
:::

::: {.mesh-node .node-amber}
◉

**BCD Framework**  
COM-B behavioural design
:::

:::


## Design Philosophy {.slide-section background-color="#FAFAF8"}

::: {.eyebrow}
Design Philosophy
:::

### Design for *Emergence* {.section-title}

::: {.two-col}

::: {.left-col}
We treat marketing ecosystems as living organisms — not machines. Our HITL approach mirrors the Baobab Tree philosophy.

::: {.card-amber}
**Rhizomatic Growth**  
AI agents spread horizontally across channels while human judgment keeps roots in behavioural truth.
:::

::: {.card-teal .mt-sm}
**Outcome-Driven**  
We replace vanity metrics with decisions that hold under the push-back of reality.
:::

:::

::: {.stat-col}

::: {.stat-card}
::: {.stat-big}
65%
:::
Routine mechanical tasks automated at Tier I
:::

::: {.stat-card}
::: {.stat-big}
24/7
:::
Agent-driven execution without human bandwidth limits
:::

:::

:::


## Service Model {.slide-section background-color="#FAFAF8"}

::: {.eyebrow}
Service Model
:::

### Three Tiers. One Operating System. {.section-title}

::: {.tier-grid}

::: {.tier-card}
[Tier I · Pilot]{.tier-badge}

**Efficiency**

Automating 65% of routine tasks — SEO, content drafts, distribution. Human validates brand voice and cultural safety.

*Agent:* Mechanical automation

[Removes the technical tax]{.tier-outcome}
:::

::: {.tier-card .tier-featured}
[Tier II · Squad]{.tier-badge .badge-teal}

**Agility**

Collaborative workflow where agents share data to optimise multi-channel campaigns. Human curates based on real-time market shifts.

*Agent:* Cross-agent optimisation

[Sync-first collaboration]{.tier-outcome .outcome-teal}
:::

::: {.tier-card .tier-amber}
[Tier III · Mesh]{.tier-badge .badge-amber}

**Transformation**

Full autonomy — lifecycle management and micro-segmentation. Human interrogates systemic logic and designs for emergence.

*Agent:* Full autonomous mesh

[Custom Marketing OS]{.tier-outcome .outcome-amber}
:::

:::


## The Differentiator {.slide-section background-color="#FAFAF8"}

::: {.eyebrow}
The Differentiator
:::

### The Spotted Ape *Advantage* {.section-title}

We don't just "do AI." We apply Behavioural Centred Design to every agent interaction.

::: {.adv-grid}

::: {.card-amber}
**Behavioural Science**  
COM-B and BCD frameworks govern how agents engage audiences — turning statistical patterns into culturally resonant behaviour change.
:::

::: {.card-teal}
**Strategic Autonomy**  
We bridge the gap between where you are and where strategy says you should be — machine speed, human wisdom woven in.
:::

::: {.card-plain}
**Pattern Recognition**  
Humans identify which machine-generated patterns are culturally resonant vs. statistical noise. Signal over volume, always.
:::

::: {.card-plain}
**TaaS Model**  
A senior strategic execution team on subscription. No retainer bloat, no agency overhead. Integrated from day one.
:::

:::


## Ready to Close the Execution *Gap?* {.slide-cta background-color="#FAFAF8"}

::: {.hero-rule}
:::

Start with a Tier I Pilot. Prove the model. Scale to a full Agentic Mesh at your own pace — with a team that steers, not just delivers.

::: {.cta-row}
[→ thespottedape.com](https://thespottedape.com){.cta-primary}
[→ marcelmare.com](https://marcelmare.com){.cta-secondary}
:::

::: {.pill-row .mt-lg}
[Human-in-the-Loop]{.pill .pill-amber}
[Agentic Mesh]{.pill .pill-teal}
[Behavioural Centred Design]{.pill .pill-amber}
:::
